name: golden-recall
notes: The operator-ratified labeled set behind GOLDEN_RECALL's two uplift cases (C1 reranker-vs-identity, C2 embedder-vs-floor). DRAFT until the operator edits/approves and flips `ratified`. All content is FICTIONAL (the repo is public); doc texts mirror the live Ring-4 shapes exactly (FileMemory::summarize turn entries, Episode::text digests). This file is NOT part of the frozen golden.json seal - golden.json references it by name ("set": "golden-recall"). Grades: 2 = directly answers, 1 = partially relevant, absent = irrelevant. Design: docs/proposals/golden-recall-set.md.

docs.text:
- user: Ravi sent the lease renewal, what are the terms?
  assistant: Sign before March 1; rent goes to 1450 plus the water split, paid by the 5th each month.

- user: remind me I owe Ravi a coffee for the noodle place tip
  assistant: Noted - you owe Ravi a coffee next time you're both at the market.

- user: why did the rollout stop on Tuesday?
  assistant: The deploy pipeline halted because the staging bucket hit its storage quota; ops cleared old artifacts and it went through.

- user: anything in the firmware release notes?
  assistant: The release notes mention the fail-safe watchdog is now optional and off by default.

- user: set up the sailing day
  assistant: Chartered the 28-foot sloop from Harborline for Saturday the 14th, 8am pickup; Tomas confirmed he brings the cooler.

- user: the step by the garage is a trip hazard
  assistant: Logged it - the plan is a rubber ramp from the hardware store to fix the trip risk by the garage step.

- user: Dr. Hartmann's office called
  assistant: They moved your cleaning to Thursday the 22nd at 09:30; bring the new insurance card.

- user: make appointment reminders longer
  assistant: Default appointment reminder set to 15 minutes before, across the calendar.

- user: the storage box is making noises
  assistant: Drive 3 is clicking and SMART shows reallocated sectors climbing - back it up and order a replacement.

- user: after the update the NAS looks odd
  assistant: The NAS web UI theme broke after the update - purely cosmetic, a patch is due next release.

- user: which graphics driver are we on?
  assistant: Pinned at 552.44 because the two newer builds crash the capture tool during recording.

- user: is the meetup still on?
  assistant: Because of the bus driver strike the Thursday GPU meetup decided to move online this week.

- user: the jar on the counter smells like nail polish remover
  assistant: The culture has separated and gone acetic - resume twice-daily feedings and it should recover in three days.

- user: the car makes a grinding noise on cold mornings
  assistant: That's the starter motor engaging late - the shop can test it at the next service.

- user: where's my storage unit again?
  assistant: Unit 9 at StoreSafe on Alder Street; the gate code is 4471 and your padlock key is the brass one.

- user: how do I take the new prescriptions?
  assistant: Blue tablet with breakfast, white one before bed, and the drops only on climbing days.

- user: backup drive schedule?
  assistant: Swap the offsite drive the first Saturday of each month; the last swap was March 2.

- user: did the registration go through?
  assistant: You're registered for the two-day systems-programming workshop June 9-10; the deposit is paid, balance due on arrival.

- user: what did the shop find?
  assistant: Brake pads at 30 percent, rotors fine; the quote is 280 for pads, booked for next Friday.

- user: plan for mom's birthday dinner
  assistant: Corner table at Antonello's booked for the 19th at 7; Marta brings the cake, you bring the card.

- user: what are we calling the billing migration?
  assistant: The billing migration is codenamed PELICAN going forward.

- user: name the new backup repo
  assistant: The restic repository is named copper-kettle-7, initialized against the offsite bucket.

- user: which locker did I get?
  assistant: Locker 214 at the gym; the combination is in your phone note titled 'gym'.

- user: set up wifi for visitors
  assistant: The guest network SSID is teapot-guest, isolated from the main LAN.

- user: anything to prepare before the workshop?
  assistant: Bring the laptop with the toolchain preinstalled and clone the exercise repo the night before.

- user: what do we still need for the sailing day?
  assistant: Sunscreen, two bags of ice for the cooler, and check the marina parking pass is still valid.

- user: quick status on the garden sensors?
  assistant: The VERDIGRIS prototype board survived a week outdoors; humidity readings drift 4 percent in rain, fix in review.

- user: any good documentaries?
  assistant: Two picks: one on deep-sea cephalopods and one about a dentist who collects vintage motorcycles.

- user: what's the coffee grinder setting?
  assistant: 18 clicks for pour-over, 8 for espresso; the burrs were cleaned last month.

- user: recycling day?
  assistant: Bins go out Wednesday night; glass pickup alternates weeks.

- user: how tall is the bookshelf we ordered?
  assistant: 190 centimeters, oak veneer, arrives in two weeks.

- user: thermostat schedule
  assistant: 21 during the day, 17 overnight, eco mode on weekdays 9 to 5.

- user: the printer is out of cyan
  assistant: Ordered two cyan cartridges; they arrive Monday. The magenta is at 40 percent.

- user: any word from the climbing gym?
  assistant: Tomas said the new overhang routes open Friday; your membership renews on the 1st.

- user: what's the sous vide time for short ribs?
  assistant: 72 hours at 57 degrees, then a hard sear; last batch was a touch under-seasoned.

[episode] Settled the Hollow Lantern save-format debate after two evenings of testing | changed: saves moved from flat JSON to a versioned binary chunk format with a migration shim | matters: old saves keep loading and the format survives modding | unresolved: compression choice for the world chunk | anchors: hollow-lantern; save-format; migration

[episode] Filed and closed out the hail damage claim on the car | changed: adjuster approved roof and hood repair at the certified shop | matters: payout covers all but the 250 deductible | unresolved: rental coverage confirmation still pending in writing | anchors: insurance; hail; claim

[episode] PELICAN cutover rehearsal ran end to end on staging | changed: invoice ids now migrate with a dual-write window instead of a freeze | matters: the zero-downtime path is proven on staging data | unresolved: the reconciliation report for legacy credit notes | anchors: pelican; billing; cutover

[episode] Traced the flaky scheduler test to a timezone assumption | changed: the test now pins a fixed zone and a fake clock; flake rate zero across 500 runs | matters: CI trust restored, no more retry-until-green | unresolved: two sibling tests still construct real clocks | anchors: flaky-test; scheduler; timezone

[episode] VERDIGRIS field trial week one wrapped | changed: the prototype survived the outdoor week; enclosure vents redesigned after condensation | matters: sensor drift in rain is the last blocker to the garden rollout | unresolved: the humidity drift fix is in review | anchors: verdigris; garden; sensors; drift

[episode] Rebuilt the pantry shelving over the weekend | changed: three fixed shelves became five adjustable ones | matters: jars are finally at eye level | unresolved: leftover lumber disposal | anchors: pantry; shelving

[episode] Locked the sailing-day logistics | changed: charter confirmed and the float plan filed with the marina office | matters: the weather window looks stable for the 14th | unresolved: backup date if the front moves in | anchors: sailing; charter; marina
